title: Review of AI–IoT frameworks for modular integrated construction: Toward zero-waiting coordination
abstract: Modular Integrated Construction (MiC) increasingly relies on real-time coordination across design, production, transportation, and installation. However, current practices remain constrained by fragmented data, inconsistent semantics, and limited cross-stage feedback. This paper examines how AI-IoT technologies can jointly support zero-waiting coordination, aiming to minimize avoidable delays and maintain consistent workflow under dynamic conditions. A mixed-review approach integrating bibliometric, systematic review, and thematic-coding was conducted on 79 articles following Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses. The findings organize existing advances into four functional domains: cyber-physical sensing for continuous state capture, intelligent-analytics for prediction and interpretation, semantic-integration for cross-stage data alignment, and adaptive-decision coordination for feedback-driven regulation. The review also clarifies the mechanisms that link these domains and identifies gaps that hinder the integration of processes. By synthesizing fragmented developments into a process-oriented framework, this paper enhances current understanding and provides practical insights for developing reliable AI-IoT-enabled coordination strategies in MiC. • AI-IoT components jointly enable continuous sensing, prediction, and feedback across MiC stages. • Unified semantic integration enhances cross-stage data interoperability for real-time MiC coordination. • Intelligent analytics support takt stability through dynamic bottleneck prediction and adaptive scheduling. • Real-time sensing improves installation accuracy, risk detection, and module alignment reliability. • Integrated AI-IoT framework strengthens zero-waiting flow through synchronized lifecycle information exchange.
title_cn: 模块化集成建筑的人工智能–物联网框架评述：朝向零等待协调的方向
abstract_cn: 模块化集成建筑（MiC）越来越依赖于设计、生产、运输和安装之间的实时协调。然而，目前的实践仍受到数据碎片化、不一致的语义和有限的跨阶段反馈的制约。本文探讨了人工智能物联网（AI-IoT）技术如何共同支持零等待协调，旨在最小化可避免的延误，并在动态条件下保持一致的工作流程。根据系统评价和荟萃分析的优先报告项目，本文对79篇文章进行了混合评审方法的研究，整合了文献计量学、系统评价和主题编码。研究结果将现有进展组织为四个功能领域：用于连续状态捕捉的网络物理传感、用于预测和解释的智能分析、用于跨阶段数据对齐的语义集成，以及用于反馈驱动调节的自适应决策协调。该评审还阐明了这些领域之间的联系机制，并识别出阻碍流程整合的空白。通过将碎片化的发展综合成一个以过程为导向的框架，本文增强了对当前理解的认识，并为开发可靠的AI-IoT支持的MiC协调策略提供了实用见解。• AI-IoT组件共同实现MiC各阶段的连续感知、预测和反馈。• 统一的语义集成增强了跨阶段数据的互操作性，以实现实时MiC协调。• 智能分析通过动态瓶颈预测和自适应调度支持节奏稳定性。• 实时感知提高了安装精度、风险检测和模块对齐的可靠性。• 集成的AI-IoT框架通过同步生命周期信息交换加强了零等待流。

title: Multimodal dynamic feature fusion framework for human–robot audio-visual interaction in complex construction conditions

title: A calculation model for particulate matter concentration on subway platform based on 2D dimensionality reduction and equivalent emission rates

title: The silent transmission belt: testing safety bullying's indirect effects on construction incident learning failures via voice suppression
abstract: Purpose This study aims to conduct a theoretical reconstruction of the phenomenon of failure to learn from incidents (FLFI) in construction projects by conceptualizing safety bullying (SB) not as episodic interpersonal misconduct, but as an institutionalized governance mechanism that structurally suppresses voice. We examine how project participant silence (PPS) operates as the transmission channel through which coercive control cultures translate managerial pressure into learning breakdowns, thereby challenging dominant explanations that attribute learning failure primarily to weak implementation or individual error. Design/methodology/approach Data from 215 valid questionnaires were analyzed using partial least squares structural equation modeling (PLS-SEM). The structural model's stability was verified via a bootstrapping procedure with 3,000 resamples. Findings PPS exerts a significant and substantial effect on FLFI. SB shows no direct impact on learning outcomes but operates entirely through PPS, indicating a full mediation effect. This indirect-only pattern reveals that learning failures emerge when governance-induced silence distorts feedback loops and fragments safety knowledge flows. Originality/value The study advances theory by reframing learning failure as a systemic managerial pathology rather than an implementation deficit. By identifying PPS as a structural inhibitor embedded in temporary project governance, it bridges organizational silence research with resilience engineering and extends high-reliability organization theory into project-based contexts. Practically, it shifts managerial focus from correcting frontline errors to redesigning silence-producing governance structures.
title_cn: 无声的传输带：通过声音压制测试安全欺凌对建筑事故学习失败的间接影响
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在对建筑项目中未能从事件中学习的现象（FLFI）进行理论重构，将安全欺凌（SB）概念化为一种制度化的治理机制，而非偶发的人际不当行为，认为其在结构上压制了声音。我们考察项目参与者沉默（PPS）如何作为传导渠道，通过强制控制文化将管理压力转化为学习障碍，从而挑战将学习失败主要归因于实施薄弱或个人错误的主流解释。 设计/方法论/途径 通过对215份有效问卷的数据进行分析，采用偏最小二乘结构方程模型（PLS-SEM）。通过3000次重抽样的自助法程序验证了结构模型的稳定性。 发现 PPS对FLFI产生显著且实质性的影响。SB对学习结果没有直接影响，而是完全通过PPS运作，表明存在完全中介效应。这种仅间接的模式揭示，当治理引发的沉默扭曲反馈循环并碎片化安全知识流时，学习失败就会出现。 原创性/价值 本研究通过将学习失败重新框定为一种系统性的管理病理，而非实施缺陷，推动了理论的发展。通过将PPS识别为嵌入临时项目治理中的结构性抑制因素，它将组织沉默研究与韧性工程相结合，并将高可靠性组织理论扩展到基于项目的背景中。在实践中，它将管理重点从纠正前线错误转向重新设计产生沉默的治理结构。

title: Feeling bad, learning fast and helping out: how growth mindset shapes construction workers' helping behaviors after mistakes
abstract: Purpose Work errors cause operational disruptions and predict distinct behavioral responses among workers. Despite the traditional view of work errors as purely detrimental, limited research has explored their potential to relate to helping behavior, which is critical for mitigating error cascades and maintaining team cohesion in construction settings. This study examines the relationship between work errors and helping behavior among construction workers, the mediating role of self-blame and prosocial motivation and the moderating role of growth mindset. Design/methodology/approach 386 construction workers completed a critical-incident recall task. SPSS, Mplus and the PROCESS macro were used to analyze mediation, moderation and moderated mediation effects. Findings Findings reveal that work errors are positively associated with helping behavior among construction workers. This relationship is mediated by self-blame and prosocial motivation. Moreover, the growth mindset significantly moderates the indirect path from work errors to helping behavior via prosocial motivation, whereas it does not significantly moderate the indirect path via self-blame. Originality/value This study extends error management and safety culture research by shifting the theoretical focus from error prevention to the proactive “error-to-helping” transition. While traditional views frame errors as purely detrimental failures, we apply affective events theory to conceptualize them as catalysts for organizational citizenship behavior (OCB), specifically helping behavior. This research clarifies how work errors are related to dual psychological paths: self-blame and prosocial motivation. Furthermore, because these psychological mechanisms are rooted in the high-stakes, safety-centric nature of the work, the model has high transferability to other similar high-risk industries, such as mining and manufacturing, where individual accountability and mutual support are equally critical for maintaining operational safety.
title_cn: 感到不适、快速学习与互助：成长心态如何影响建筑工人在犯错后的互助行为
abstract_cn: 目的 工作错误会导致操作中断，并预测工人之间不同的行为反应。尽管传统观点将工作错误视为纯粹的负面因素，但关于其与帮助行为之间潜在关系的研究仍然有限，而帮助行为对于减轻错误连锁反应和维持建筑环境中的团队凝聚力至关重要。本研究探讨了建筑工人工作错误与帮助行为之间的关系，自责和亲社会动机的中介作用，以及成长心态的调节作用。 设计/方法 386名建筑工人完成了一项关键事件回忆任务。使用SPSS、Mplus和PROCESS宏对中介、调节和调节中介效应进行了分析。 发现 研究结果表明，工作错误与建筑工人的帮助行为呈正相关。该关系受到自责和亲社会动机的中介作用。此外，成长心态显著调节了工作错误通过亲社会动机对帮助行为的间接路径，而对通过自责的间接路径没有显著调节作用。 原创性/价值 本研究通过将理论重点从错误预防转向主动的“错误到帮助”转变，扩展了错误管理和安全文化的研究。尽管传统观点将错误视为纯粹的负面失败，但我们应用情感事件理论将其概念化为组织公民行为（OCB）的催化剂，特别是帮助行为。本研究阐明了工作错误与自责和亲社会动机这两条心理路径之间的关系。此外，由于这些心理机制根植于高风险、安全为中心的工作性质，该模型具有很高的可转移性，适用于其他类似的高风险行业，如矿业和制造业，在这些行业中，个人责任和相互支持同样对维护操作安全至关重要。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: SolarisBIM.AI: Smart Sustainable Building Planning with BIM-Based Solar-Production Estimation Using Machine-Learning Radiation Forecasts
abstract: Urban expansion, driven by economic and technological development, has intensified building construction and increased energy demand. Over the last decade, this trend has become a global challenge due to the depletion of fossil fuel reserves and the environmental impacts associated with greenhouse gas emissions. As a result, integrating renewable energy sources has become essential for achieving sustainable development goals. Among the available alternatives, photovoltaic energy stands out as a solution to meet the growing energy demand in buildings. In this context, this study presents SolarisBIM.AI, a framework that integrates machine learning–based solar radiation forecasting with a Dynamo routine within a Building Information Modeling (BIM) environment to quantify solar energy produced and CO2 avoided. Three predictive approaches were tested: extreme gradient boosting (XGBoost), long short-term memory networks (LSTMs), and feedforward neural networks (FNNs). Using a 49-year historical solar radiation series from six cities in Pernambuco, Brazil, the FNN achieved the best performance. In a real case study, SolarisBIM.AI predicted an annual solar energy production of 381,802 kWh for 2023, only a 2% overestimation compared with the measured production of 374,204 kWh at the center for technology and geosciences (CTG) UFPE building. This close agreement reinforces the model’s suitability for early-stage design assessments and decision-making in building energy planning. These results demonstrate that the proposed approach can support architects, engineers, and planners in quantifying solar energy production and assessing building sustainability at the design stage.
title_cn: SolarisBIM.AI：基于BIM的太阳能生产估算与机器学习辐射预测相结合的智能可持续建筑规划
abstract_cn: 城市扩张受经济和技术发展的驱动，建筑施工加剧，能源需求增加。在过去十年中，由于化石燃料储备的枯竭以及与温室气体排放相关的环境影响，这一趋势已成为全球性挑战。因此，整合可再生能源已成为实现可持续发展目标的关键。在可用的替代方案中，光伏能源作为满足建筑日益增长的能源需求的解决方案脱颖而出。在这种背景下，本研究提出了SolarisBIM.AI，一个将基于机器学习的太阳辐射预测与建筑信息建模（BIM）环境中的Dynamo例程相结合的框架，以量化产生的太阳能和避免的二氧化碳排放。测试了三种预测方法：极端梯度提升（XGBoost）、长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和前馈神经网络（FNN）。利用来自巴西伯南布哥州六个城市的49年历史太阳辐射系列，FNN取得了最佳表现。在一个实际案例研究中，SolarisBIM.AI预测2023年的年太阳能生产为381,802 kWh，与在技术与地球科学中心（CTG）UFPE建筑中测得的374,204 kWh的生产量相比，仅有2%的高估。这一接近的结果进一步验证了该模型在建筑能源规划的早期设计评估和决策中的适用性。这些结果表明，所提出的方法可以支持建筑师、工程师和规划者在设计阶段量化太阳能生产并评估建筑的可持续性。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: LLM-QueryBC: An LLM-Based Regulation Query System for Textual and Tabular Information in Building Codes
abstract: The process of querying building codes has long been time-consuming and labor-intensive, requiring extensive manual effort to repeatedly consult and confirm regulations throughout design and review phases. Existing regulation query systems are limited to simple searches, often resulting in errors and failing to provide intelligent responses to users. Although the emergence of large language models (LLMs) offers potential solutions due to their natural language processing abilities, they face challenges such as insufficient domain knowledge, semantic misalignment, and difficulties in handling complex tabular data. To address these limitations, we propose a novel system, LLMs Query Building Codes (LLM-QueryBC), which integrates LLMs with a semantic network–enhanced retrieval-augmented generation (SN-RAG) for text-based queries and a specialized agent called Agent for Tables in Building Codes (TaBCe) for tabular queries. TaBCe leverages the Reasoning and Acting (ReAct) framework, think-by-structure planning method, RAG, computational tools, and a memory module to enhance its functionality. The system autonomously determines internal logic, invokes external tools, and mitigates hallucination issues associated with LLMs in the building code domain. We evaluated our system using fire safety regulations—a critical domain due to its impact on life safety, property protection, and legal compliance. Experimental results demonstrated significant improvements: textual query accuracy increased by 24%, and tabular query accuracy rose by 25%. Additionally, we conducted a case study involving fire safety code queries for a real-world design of a mixed-use high-rise building, further validating the system’s practical applicability. These advancements offer greater value to users and promote broader adoption of intelligent regulation query systems.
title_cn: LLM-QueryBC：一种基于大型语言模型的建筑规范文本和表格信息查询系统
abstract_cn: 查询建筑规范的过程长期以来一直耗时且劳动密集，需要在设计和审查阶段进行大量的手动努力，以反复查阅和确认相关规定。现有的法规查询系统仅限于简单搜索，常常导致错误，并未能为用户提供智能响应。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现由于其自然语言处理能力提供了潜在解决方案，但它们面临着领域知识不足、语义不对齐以及处理复杂表格数据的困难等挑战。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的系统——LLMs 查询建筑规范（LLM-QueryBC），该系统将 LLMs 与语义网络增强的检索增强生成（SN-RAG）相结合，用于文本查询，并为表格查询提供一个名为建筑规范表格代理（TaBCe）的专门代理。TaBCe 利用推理与行动（ReAct）框架、结构思维规划方法、RAG、计算工具和记忆模块来增强其功能。该系统能够自主确定内部逻辑，调用外部工具，并减轻与 LLMs 在建筑规范领域相关的幻觉问题。我们使用消防安全法规对系统进行了评估——这一领域至关重要，因为它影响生命安全、财产保护和法律合规。实验结果显示显著改善：文本查询的准确性提高了 24%，表格查询的准确性提高了 25%。此外，我们还进行了一个案例研究，涉及对实际设计的混合用途高层建筑的消防安全规范查询，进一步验证了系统的实际适用性。这些进展为用户提供了更大的价值，并促进了智能法规查询系统的更广泛应用。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Effects of Abusive Supervision on Construction Industry Workers’ Work Efficiency: A Study Based on EEG
abstract: Abusive supervision (AS) is an antiproductive behavior that significantly affects operational efficiency and employee performance, but its precise impact mechanism remains poorly understood. This study aimed to quantify the differential impact of active versus passive AS on construction workers’ work efficiency and verify the mediating role of cognitive states. Utilizing electroencephalogram (EEG) feature extraction integrated with cognitive science, we exposed 25 construction worker participants to randomized scenarios simulating active AS, passive AS, and control conditions. Behavioral performance data and cognitive state indicators were systematically collected and analyzed. AS significantly reduced work efficiency, with active AS having a greater impact than passive AS. AS was negatively correlated with attention and valence index, but positively correlated with mental fatigue. The adoption of EEG technology introduced a novel methodological approach to construction AS research, and this study empirically reveals the pathway through which AS impairs work efficiency via cognitive impairment. It provides a scientific foundation for developing targeted interventions to mitigate AS’s adverse effects on construction worker productivity.
title_cn: 虐待性监督对建筑行业工人工作效率的影响：基于脑电图的研究
abstract_cn: 虐待性监督（AS）是一种反生产性的行为，显著影响操作效率和员工绩效，但其具体影响机制仍然不甚明了。本研究旨在量化主动与被动AS对建筑工人工作效率的差异性影响，并验证认知状态的中介作用。我们利用脑电图（EEG）特征提取与认知科学相结合，随机让25名建筑工人参与模拟主动AS、被动AS和控制条件的场景。系统收集并分析了行为表现数据和认知状态指标。研究发现，AS显著降低了工作效率，其中主动AS的影响大于被动AS。AS与注意力和情感指数呈负相关，而与心理疲劳呈正相关。EEG技术的应用为建筑领域的AS研究引入了一种新颖的方法论，本研究实证揭示了AS通过认知损害影响工作效率的路径，为制定针对性的干预措施以减轻AS对建筑工人生产力的不利影响提供了科学基础。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Blockchain-Based Time Impact Analysis Method for Sustainable Delay Management in EPC Projects
title_cn: 基于区块链的时间影响分析方法在EPC项目可持续延误管理中的应用

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Impact of ICT Function Use on Employees’ Job Performance in International Engineering Enterprises: A Configurational Perspective
abstract: The widespread application of information and communication technology (ICT) enhances the efficiency of information transmission across geographically dispersed organizations and reduces communication costs, providing opportunities for international engineering enterprises to effectively support overseas project departments. However, existing studies have also recognized the negative impacts of ICT use on overseas employees’ performance, such as causing information overload and increasing job stress on employees. Traditional linear analysis methods struggle to reveal the interactions between distinct ICT functions and lack differentiated explanations for ICT management tactics under varying contextual conditions. This study introduces a configurational perspective, analyzing survey data from 179 employees in overseas project departments of international engineering enterprises. By using fuzzy-set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA), this study systematically investigates the dynamic alignment patterns among ICT support, ICT control, ICT-induced job stress, project size, and job complexity. The study reveals complementary and substitutive relationships between ICT functions and their impact paths on job performance across different contexts. Key findings include: (1) Three pathways lead to the high job performance of employees in overseas project departments, with path selection influenced by contextual conditions, including project size and job complexity; (2) low job performance is not symmetrically related to high performance but arises from control failure (high-frequency control with high stress) or the absence of ICT support function; and (3) ICT-induced job stress primarily stems from control function, while support function mitigates such stress. The results provide theoretical insights into the interplay of ICT functions, contextual conditions, and their impacts on job performance. Practical guidance is offered for enterprises to optimize ICT use for enhanced employee performance.
title_cn: 信息通信技术功能使用对国际工程企业员工工作表现的影响：一种配置视角
abstract_cn: 信息与通信技术（ICT）的广泛应用提高了地理分散组织之间信息传递的效率，降低了沟通成本，为国际工程企业有效支持海外项目部门提供了机会。然而，现有研究也认识到ICT使用对海外员工绩效的负面影响，例如导致信息过载和增加员工的工作压力。传统的线性分析方法难以揭示不同ICT功能之间的相互作用，并且在不同情境条件下缺乏对ICT管理策略的差异化解释。本研究引入了配置视角，分析了来自179名国际工程企业海外项目部门员工的调查数据。通过使用模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA），本研究系统地探讨了ICT支持、ICT控制、ICT引发的工作压力、项目规模和工作复杂性之间的动态对齐模式。研究揭示了ICT功能之间的互补和替代关系及其在不同情境下对工作绩效的影响路径。主要发现包括：（1）三条路径导致海外项目部门员工的高工作绩效，路径选择受项目规模和工作复杂性等情境条件的影响；（2）低工作绩效与高绩效并非对称关系，而是源于控制失败（高频控制伴随高压力）或缺乏ICT支持功能；（3）ICT引发的工作压力主要源于控制功能，而支持功能则缓解了这种压力。研究结果为ICT功能、情境条件及其对工作绩效的影响之间的相互作用提供了理论见解，并为企业优化ICT使用以提升员工绩效提供了实践指导。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Integrated Dual-Crane Positioning and Lifting Planning in Extreme Conditions: A Critical States and Spatial Constraint Optimization Approach
abstract: The intelligent planning of dual-crane cooperative lifting has emerged as a critical enabling technology for handling heavy and oversized payloads in complex engineering environments, particularly as infrastructure projects increase in scale and operational constraints become more challenging. However, existing planning methods neglect the critical influence of crane positioning on path feasibility. Besides, they remain inadequate for extreme conditions where payloads approach maximum capacity, and even minor swings may trigger catastrophic instability. This study proposes a hierarchical optimization framework for dual-crane positioning and lifting planning under such extreme scenarios, integrating critical states and spatial constraints. The upper layer systematically optimizes crane positions and motions by resolving geometric constraints between cranes and payloads, including working radii, boom lengths, slewing angles, and hoisting length. A weighted multiobjective function is formulated to balance energy consumption and time efficiency, and an improved A* algorithm is used to efficiently solve the integrated optimization problem through critical states discretization, where slewing motion is segmented into several phases. Furthermore, the lower layer enforces spatial synchronization through antiswing trajectory planning, where angular velocity profiles of both cranes are coordinated to maintain payload stability while adhering to crane-payload geometric constraints. Through simulation and software platform-based pseudo-experiments, the proposed method demonstrates a 66.57% improvement in computational efficiency and a 50.04% enhancement in safety performance compared to traditional approaches, while ensuring guaranteed collision avoidance and mechanical feasibility in extreme conditions. The proposed method significantly enhances safety and maximizes payload utilization under extreme conditions, providing a robust theoretical and practical framework that addresses fundamental challenges in modern dual-crane lifting operations.
topics: Dynamics and Control of Mechanical Systems
title_cn: 极端条件下集成双起重机定位与提升规划：一种临界状态与空间约束优化方法
abstract_cn: 双吊机协作提升的智能规划已成为在复杂工程环境中处理重型和超大负载的关键技术，尤其是在基础设施项目规模不断扩大且操作约束日益严峻的背景下。然而，现有的规划方法忽视了吊机定位对路径可行性的关键影响。此外，它们在极端条件下也显得不足，尤其是当负载接近最大容量时，即使是微小的摆动也可能引发灾难性的失稳。本研究提出了一种层次优化框架，用于在此类极端场景下进行双吊机定位和提升规划，整合了关键状态和空间约束。上层通过解决吊机与负载之间的几何约束（包括工作半径、臂长、回转角度和提升长度）系统地优化吊机的位置和运动。制定了一个加权多目标函数，以平衡能耗和时间效率，并采用改进的A*算法，通过关键状态离散化有效地解决集成优化问题，其中回转运动被分段为多个阶段。此外，下层通过抗摆轨迹规划强制实施空间同步，协调两台吊机的角速度曲线，以在遵循吊机-负载几何约束的同时保持负载的稳定性。通过仿真和基于软件平台的伪实验，所提出的方法在计算效率上比传统方法提高了66.57%，在安全性能上提升了50.04%，同时确保在极端条件下的碰撞避免和机械可行性。该方法显著提高了安全性，并在极端条件下最大化了负载利用率，为解决现代双吊机提升作业中的基本挑战提供了一个稳健的理论和实践框架。

title: ChatGPT as a Training Coach: Pattern-Specific Outcomes in Build America Buy America Act Training
abstract: This study explores the role of generative artificial intelligence (Gen-AI) as a compliance training agent by examining how interactive prompt patterns influence knowledge acquisition in the context of the Build America Buy America (BABA) Act. Amid growing interest in scalable, personalized learning tools, this experiment tests ChatGPT’s capacity to deliver regulatory education through adaptive coaching styles. The methodology integrates pre- and post-training assessments, control questions for knowledge retention, and coaching formats that range from scenario-based to interactive and gamified prompts. Results reveal that Gen-AI-driven training significantly improves compliance knowledge, particularly when prompt structures are aligned with learners’ prior understanding. Participants with low initial knowledge exhibited the greatest gains, indicating the value of real-time feedback and conversational scaffolding in supporting novice learners. Furthermore, control items confirm that learning was substantive rather than superficial, reinforcing Gen-AI’s potential for anchored instruction. However, the effectiveness of prompt types varied by knowledge tier, with structured formats outperforming more exploratory ones specifically among less-prepared participants. These findings carry meaningful implications for public-sector training: while Gen-AI training agents can extend access and personalize instruction, their design must consider learner readiness and cognitive load. The study also identifies prompt development as a core challenge, requiring balance between engagement, clarity, and instructional depth. As such, this research contributes both empirical evidence and practical guidance for integrating Gen-AI into compliance training, emphasizing the importance of pairing technological capability with pedagogical intent to ensure measurable learning outcomes.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: ChatGPT作为培训教练：在《建设美国，购买美国法案》培训中的模式特定结果
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了生成性人工智能（Gen-AI）作为合规培训代理的角色，考察了互动提示模式如何影响《建设美国，购买美国法案》（BABA法案）背景下的知识获取。在对可扩展、个性化学习工具日益增长的兴趣中，本实验测试了ChatGPT通过适应性辅导风格提供监管教育的能力。研究方法整合了培训前后的评估、知识保留的控制问题，以及从情境基础到互动和游戏化提示的多种辅导格式。结果显示，基于Gen-AI的培训显著提高了合规知识，尤其是在提示结构与学习者先前理解相一致时。初始知识较低的参与者表现出最大的知识提升，表明实时反馈和对话式支架在支持新手学习者方面的价值。此外，控制项目确认学习是实质性的而非表面的，进一步强化了Gen-AI在有针对性的教学中的潜力。然而，提示类型的有效性因知识层级而异，结构化格式在准备不足的参与者中表现优于更具探索性的格式。这些发现对公共部门培训具有重要意义：虽然Gen-AI培训代理可以扩展访问和个性化教学，但其设计必须考虑学习者的准备程度和认知负荷。研究还将提示开发确定为一个核心挑战，需要在参与度、清晰度和教学深度之间取得平衡。因此，本研究为将Gen-AI整合到合规培训中提供了实证证据和实践指导，强调将技术能力与教学意图相结合的重要性，以确保可衡量的学习成果。

title: Deliberate or Emergent? How Organizations Adopt Hybrid Project Management
abstract: Hybrid project management combines traditional and agile approaches for managing complex projects. While its benefits and setups are well studied, how organizations adopt and implement hybrid project management remains unclear. Hence, this study addresses this gap through a multiple-case design, finding that hybrid project management adoption is shaped by organizational context, leadership, and iterative adjustments to evolving needs. It proposes a Hybrid Project Management Adoption Model, featuring a novel distinction between conscious adoption (a deliberate, structured transition) and unconscious adoption (an organic, emergent evolution). The study advances hybrid project management research by theorizing adoption as a dual-path process and explaining how practices evolve under organizational conditions.
title_cn: 故意还是自发？组织如何采用混合项目管理
abstract_cn: 混合项目管理结合了传统和敏捷的方法来管理复杂项目。尽管其优势和设置已得到充分研究，但组织如何采纳和实施混合项目管理仍然不清楚。因此，本研究通过多案例设计来填补这一空白，发现混合项目管理的采纳受到组织背景、领导力以及对不断变化需求的迭代调整的影响。研究提出了一种混合项目管理采纳模型，其中对有意识采纳（一种有意的、结构化的过渡）和无意识采纳（一种有机的、渐进的演变）进行了新颖的区分。该研究通过将采纳理论化为双路径过程，并解释实践在组织条件下如何演变，推动了混合项目管理研究的发展。

title: Unraveling Stakeholder Engagement in Megaprojects: A Political Opportunity Structure Perspective in Turbulent Times
abstract: Infrastructure projects are often tied to political agendas, leading to community skepticism and opposition. This study explores how changes in the political system influenced engagement between project opposers and project promoters. Using a qualitative research approach and a case study strategy, archival data related to the prematurely terminated Bisri Dam megaproject in Lebanon were collected and analyzed. Results show that deepened division among political parties (configuration of power) and a wider distribution of power among project opposers (formal institutional structure) intensified opposition, leading to project cancellation. This study highlights the importance of considering a broad political perspective in project stakeholder engagement to improve megaproject outcomes from a socially sustainable standpoint.
title_cn: 解读大型项目中的利益相关者参与：动荡时期的政治机会结构视角
abstract_cn: 基础设施项目往往与政治议程紧密相连，这导致了社区的怀疑和反对。本研究探讨了政治体制的变化如何影响项目反对者与项目推动者之间的互动。采用定性研究方法和案例研究策略，收集并分析了与黎巴嫩提前终止的比斯里大坝超级项目相关的档案数据。结果表明，政党之间的分歧加深（权力配置）以及项目反对者之间权力的更广泛分配（正式制度结构）加剧了反对情绪，最终导致项目被取消。本研究强调了在项目利益相关者参与中考虑广泛政治视角的重要性，以从社会可持续的角度改善超级项目的成果。

title: From detection to decision: integrating contextual metadata into an AI-based hospital hazard detection system
abstract: • Two-stage model integrates metadata to improve hospital hazard detection. • Reduces false detections by leveraging human expertise on hazard occurrences. • Enhanced cross-location generalization without model retraining. • Enables lower detection thresholds while maintaining high precision. • Various object detectors assessed on realistic indoor hazard scenarios. Maintaining environmental safety in hospitals is critical for preventing injuries and infections, yet manual monitoring is resource-intensive and prone to coverage gaps. This study presents a novel, two-stage AI framework for automated hazard detection. We first evaluated three state-of-the-art architectures—YOLOv8, DETR, and EfficientDet—finding that while all models demonstrated strong in-domain performance, they suffered significant accuracy loss in unseen areas due to domain shift. Among these models, YOLOv8 demonstrated superior baseline robustness. To address this generalization gap, we developed a second, metadata-augmented refinement layer that integrates hospital-specific spatial and temporal hazard information. Uniquely, this approach incorporates expert operational knowledge externally during inference rather than embedding it during training, thereby reducing the need for extensive annotated datasets or frequent model retraining. Experiments conducted in a major tertiary medical center demonstrate that metadata augmentation significantly improves detection reliability in cross-domain scenarios. The system operates effectively at lower objectiveness thresholds, achieving the high recall essential for safety–critical applications while simultaneously improving precision. Overall, the proposed framework offers a scalable and data-efficient solution for real-time environmental risk management. By bridging the gap between visual AI capabilities and the rigorous safety demands of healthcare facilities, it provides a practical pathway for enhancing hazard detection, situational awareness, and operational resilience.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 从检测到决策：将上下文元数据整合到基于人工智能的医院危险检测系统中
abstract_cn: • 两阶段模型整合元数据以改善医院危险检测。 • 通过利用人类对危险发生的专业知识减少误报。 • 在不重新训练模型的情况下增强跨地点的泛化能力。 • 允许在保持高精度的同时降低检测阈值。 • 在现实室内危险场景中评估了多种目标检测器。 在医院中维护环境安全对于预防伤害和感染至关重要，但手动监测资源密集且容易出现覆盖盲点。本研究提出了一种新颖的两阶段人工智能框架，用于自动化危险检测。我们首先评估了三种最先进的架构——YOLOv8、DETR和EfficientDet，发现虽然所有模型在领域内表现强劲，但由于领域转移在未见区域遭遇了显著的准确性损失。在这些模型中，YOLOv8表现出更强的基线鲁棒性。为了解决这一泛化差距，我们开发了第二个增强元数据的精炼层，整合了医院特定的空间和时间危险信息。独特之处在于，该方法在推理过程中外部引入专家操作知识，而不是在训练期间嵌入，从而减少了对大量标注数据集或频繁模型重训练的需求。在一家大型三级医疗中心进行的实验表明，元数据增强显著提高了跨领域场景中的检测可靠性。该系统在较低的客观阈值下有效运行，实现了安全关键应用所需的高召回率，同时提高了精度。总体而言，所提出的框架为实时环境风险管理提供了一个可扩展且数据高效的解决方案。通过弥合视觉人工智能能力与医疗设施严格安全需求之间的差距，它为增强危险检测、情境意识和操作韧性提供了切实可行的路径。

title: The ADAPTER-health questionnaire: A tool for measuring team resilience in healthcare
title_cn: ADAPTER健康问卷：一种衡量医疗团队韧性的工具

title: Investigating the critical building layout features on the wayfinding process by integrating graph theory and virtual reality
title_cn: 通过整合图论和虚拟现实，研究建筑布局特征对路径寻找过程的关键影响。
